Typedefs | Functions
stream_buffers.h File Reference

Typed list of named stream buffers. More...

#include <stdbool.h>
#include <stddef.h>
#include <string.h>
#include "list.h"
#include "stream_buffer.h"

Go to the source code of this file.

Typedefs

typedef list_t stream_buffers_t
 List of stream_buffer_t entries.
 

Functions

static stream_buffers_t * stream_buffers_new (size_t initial_capacity)
 Allocate a new stream_buffers list.
 
static void stream_buffers_free (stream_buffers_t *stream_buffers, void(*free_func)(void *))
 Free a stream_buffers list and optionally each entry.
 
static bool stream_buffers_add (stream_buffers_t *stream_buffers, stream_buffer_t *stream_buffer)
 Append a stream buffer to the list.
 
static stream_buffer_t * stream_buffers_get (const stream_buffers_t *stream_buffers, size_t index)
 Retrieve a stream buffer by index.
 
static size_t stream_buffers_size (const stream_buffers_t *stream_buffers)
 Return the current number of stream buffers.
 
static size_t stream_buffers_capacity (const stream_buffers_t *stream_buffers)
 Return the allocated capacity.
 
static bool stream_buffers_empty (const stream_buffers_t *stream_buffers)
 Check whether the list is empty.
 
static stream_buffer_t * stream_buffers_find (const stream_buffers_t *stream_buffers, const char *name)
 Find a stream buffer by stream name.
 
static void stream_buffers_clear (stream_buffers_t *stream_buffers, void(*free_func)(void *))
 Remove all entries from the list, optionally freeing each one.
 
static void stream_buffers_iterate (const stream_buffers_t *stream_buffers, void(*callback)(stream_buffer_t *))
 Iterate over all entries and invoke a callback for each.
 

Detailed Description

Author
IMD Software Team
Attention

Copyright (c) 2026 STMicroelectronics. All rights reserved.

This software is licensed under terms that can be found in the LICENSE file in the root directory of this software component. If no LICENSE file comes with this software, it is provided AS-IS.

Provides stream_buffers_t (a list_t specialization) together with creation, access, lookup and iteration helpers for managing collections of stream_buffer_t entries.

stream_buffer_t * stream_buffer )

[in]stream_bufferPointer to the entry to copy in.
Returns
true on success.

const char * name )
inlinestatic
Parameters
[in]stream_buffersPointer to the list.
[in]nameNull-terminated stream name to search for.
Returns
Pointer to the matching entry, or NULL if not found.

[in]stream_buffersPointer to the list.
